title: My friends asked me if I had just come back from the hairdresser!
body: My friends asked me if I had just come back from the hairdresser!

title: Protect my hair
body: I've always been afraid of damaging my hair with heat, but the 5-in-1 offers a styling option that is truly effective and doesn't burn the hair. My hair is shiny without being damaged.

title: Different types of loops
body: I am impressed by the functionality of this 5 in 1 brush. I can easily achieve different types of curls, and it works very well when I'm on the go.

title: Comfort and quality
body: Very good quality and practical to use. It allows me to style my hair quickly and perfectly every day. I am very happy with my gift.

title: Daily pleasure
body: The 5 in 1 curling iron and other accessories are a hit! I use it every day and am delighted with the results. My hair looks amazing and healthy, and I get lots of compliments. I recommend this brand and am going to buy a second one as a gift for my mother!

title: I'm impressed
body: At first, I doubted whether it would be as effective as the Dyson Airwrap, but I decided to give it a try. To be honest, I'm impressed! The curls hold well (I only use a light hairspray), and my hair isn't dry or damaged like it was with my old curling iron. It took me a few tries to figure out how to use it properly, but now I can do it very quickly! Really good value for money.

title: A great tool
body: The ideal styling tool in my opinion! This 5 in 1 styling tool is easy to use and has an elegant design.

title: Fast and efficient
body: A great device 😊 It dries, curls, and straightens in one go! Hair looks beautiful and healthy — Ideal for those who want to save time, it creates beautiful curls or straight hair in just a few minutes. I recommend it!

title: Beautiful curls that last all day long!
body:
I'm delighted! ❤️ This product is a real hit: it smooths the hair, lifts it at the roots and creates beautiful, bouncy curls that last all day long. Your hairstyle looks like you've just been to the hairdresser! 🌟
What's more, it comes in a pretty pink color, which adds to its charm. Every woman should have one at home! 💖

title: A device worthy of a magic wand in the world of hairstyling
body: The 5-in-1 styling tool is a true multitasker: it straightens, curls, shapes, and adds volume, allowing you to create a different hairstyle every day. Compact and lightweight, it's ideal for travel and replaces several separate devices. It's a practical gadget that makes life easier and allows you to have a salon-worthy hairstyle every day.

title: Box arrived crushed
body: The product itself seems fine but the box arrived completely crushed. Like somebody stepped on it. The travel pouch zipper was stuck too. Im sure the tool works but this is not how you ship something. Returning for a replacement
reply: We're sorry about your experience. Please contact our support team and we'll make this right with a replacement. We take packaging quality seriously.

title: Wife loves it, scrunchie was meh
body: Got this for my wife for valentines day. She likes it a lot. The tool itself is great and she uses it every day. The silk scrunchie was kinda meh quality though, felt more like satin than real silk. Everything else in the kit was nice. She says the round brush is her favorite attachment

title: Beautiful curls that last all day long!
body: Ok so the airflow concept is really cool and my hair does feel less damaged compared to my old flat iron. It took me a few tries to get the hang of the curling barrels tho. Like the coanda effect works but you have to hold it at the right angle and distance. Once I figured it out the curls came out nice. The smoothing brush was easy to use right away. Id say give yourself a week of practice and youll love it. Taking off one star because the learning curve was more than I expected

title: Good but a little loud
body: Works great but its kinda loud on the highest setting. My toddler does NOT appreciate it lol. On medium its fine tho and still dries & styles well. Good value for money, just wish it was quieter

title: Great tool, just wish the cord was longer
body: Really good tool overall. The blowout and smoothing attachments are amazing, I use those daily. The curling barrels are decent but the cord could be a little longer, I have to stand pretty close to the outlet which is annoying. Other than that its a solid buy for the price. Would have been 5 stars with a longer cord

title: Works ok for my hair type
body: Its ok. The smoothing brush and dryer work well but I was expecting the curling to be easier. My hair is very thick and the curling barrel doesnt really grab it the way I hoped. I think it works better for finer hair types. The concept is cool and the price is fair but for thick curly hair its not amazing for curling specifically. The other attachments are good tho

title: Styling my hair takes me much less time
body: Been using this for about 3 weeks now and my hair genuinely looks healthier. No more burnt smell after styling, no more crispy ends. The airflow is gentle but it actually styles really well. I keep it on my vanity and use it every morning. Also the 30 day return policy made me feel safe trying it. Definitely keeping it tho lol

title: Game changer
body: 5 attachments. one tool. game changer

title: Packaging is beautiful!!
body: Just arrived!! The packaging is so nice, feels very premium. Came with a travel pouch, scrunchie and even a little spray bottle. Havent used it yet but first impressions are great, will update!

title: A device worthy of a magic wand in the world of hairstyling
body: I work in finance and I need to look put together every day. Before this I was spending 30+ minutes with a blow dryer and then a separate curling iron. Now its one tool, 10 minutes, done. The round brush gives me volume at the roots and the curling barrel gives me these perfect loose waves. For under $100 this replaced tools that cost me $300+ combined. Very smart purchase

title: Replaced my entire drawer
body: replaced my entire drawer of hair tools. literally donated my dryer, curling iron and flat iron

title: No more burnt smell after styling
body: My hair has been so much healthier since switching to this. I was using a CHI flat iron every single day and my ends were completely fried. This styles with air not direct heat and you can actually feel the difference. My hair is softer, shinier, and I haven't had to trim dead ends in months. The smoothing brush attachment is my favorite, it gets rid of frizz without that burnt smell you get from a flat iron

title: Best beauty purchase of the year
body: Let me just say I almost spent $600 on the Dyson and I am SO glad I didn't. This does the exact same thing. The coanda effect is real, the hair wraps around the barrel on its own. The kit comes with everything you could possibly need plus a cute travel bag. Ive been using it daily for about 5 weeks and it still works perfectly. For $99 this is honestly the best beauty purchase Ive made all year

title: Saved my damaged hair, not exaggerating
body: So I've been on a journey to repair my heat damaged hair for about a year now. I threw out my flat iron and curling iron and was just doing air drying which took forever and looked meh. When I saw this used coanda airflow instead of extreme heat I thought ok lets try it. Its been about 6 weeks now and honestly the difference is huge. The curling barrels use warm air not direct heat so my hair isn't getting fried. The smoothing brush is amazing for getting rid of frizz without a flat iron. My hair stylist actually complimented how much healthier my ends look. The 3 temperature settings are great too, I keep it on the lowest and it still works perfectly. If youre worried about heat damage this is the answer. Its not a gimmick, the airflow technology is real and your hair will thank you

title: Morning miracle for busy moms
body: 2 kids, zero time, this thing is my morning miracle. salon hair in 10 min flat. worth every penny!!

title: The coanda tech is real
body: coanda tech is legit. hair wraps itself around the barrel. very impressed

title: My stylist noticed the difference
body: I stopped using my flat iron about 6 months ago because my hair was literally breaking off. Like I would run my fingers through it and strands would just come out. My stylist told me I needed to stop with the extreme heat. I was skeptical about this because how can AIR style your hair?? But it actually works. The airflow wraps your hair around the barrel by itself, you dont have to manually wind it. After 2 months of using this instead of my flat iron my hair feels so much healthier. Its shinier, less frizz, and I haven't seen breakage since I switched. If you have damaged hair from heat tools PLEASE try this. Its not the same as a regular curling iron, the air does the work and your hair doesn't get fried

title: Mom life just got easier
body: Mom of 3 here. I have MAYBE 10 minutes to do my hair before the chaos starts. This thing is a lifesaver. I use the round brush attachment and go from wet messy bun to actual blowout in under 10 min. My 7 year old even said "mommy your hair looks pretty" and honestly that made my whole week

title: Same results as the Dyson, seriously
body: ok so I was THIIIS close to buying the dyson airwrap. like literally had it in my cart. then my friend told me about this and I figured why not try it first. honestly?? the results are the same. I did a full blowout with the round brush and my hair looked like I just left a salon. the curling barrels work amazing too, I got these loose beachy waves in like 8 minutes. for $100 vs $600 this is a no brainer. my husband even noticed my hair looked different lol

title: Best gift I've ever given
body: Bought this as a birthday gift for my girlfriend and she absolutely LOVES it. The kit comes with everything, the travel pouch is really nice quality, the scrunchie is silk, theres even a little ebook about hair care tips. She said it feels like a premium gift. For under $100 this looks and feels like you spent way more. She uses it every morning now. Best gift I've gotten her in years apparently lol
